title: KODO Heartbeat Hypothesis
description: Structured hypothesis emitted by Claude for kodo-heartbeat.sh when deterministic interventions do not match a degraded health pattern.

intervention.description: The single proposed intervention kind, or null when the evaluator cannot distinguish this failure mode.

target.description: The mutable-surface target for the proposed intervention.

kind.description: The target category, such as pipeline_state metadata, a TOML file, a confidence band, or an operator PR.

identifier.description: The precise target identifier needed to apply the intervention, such as event_id:domain, a file path, or a band name.

parameters.description: Intervention-specific scalar parameters required to apply exactly one minimal change.

rationale.description: One sentence explaining why this specific minimal change should improve the current health signal.

expected_delta.description: The expected positive change in health_score if the intervention succeeds.

rollback_plan.description: The exact inverse operation heartbeat should use if the trial is discarded or crashes.

confidence.description: Claude's confidence in the hypothesis on a scale from 0 to 1.
